nodes.label: AI as code scaffolding tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI gives working skeleton for me to adapt

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I'll go through step-by-step adapting and expanding on what it gave me

nodes.label: AI as implementation executor
nodes.grounding_span: I treat it more as a hands-off than a collaboration

nodes.label: AI transparency and reproducibility
nodes.grounding_span: we started talking more openly about how we were using AI and agreed on some informal guidelines

nodes.label: Human oversight of AI-generated code
nodes.grounding_span: I can't rely on AI blindly, it's a tool not a replacement for careful work

nodes.label: AI for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I love automating communication so that it sounds professional

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: speeds things up and gave me a sense of progress

nodes.label: Code quality and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: run all AI generated code through our standard review process

nodes.label: Team cohesion and shared standards
nodes.grounding_span: we started talking more openly about how we were using AI and agreed on some informal guidelines

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I felt really satisfied when I used AI to help me outline a tricky feature

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's hidden assumptions
nodes.grounding_span: I got frustrated when AI generated code that looks fine at first but later caused issues

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I plan to continue carefully, delegating work and collaborating when small details require a more careful hand

nodes.label: Task decomposition into small verifiable steps
nodes.grounding_span: I can just run the test afterwards and see which one's pass or fail

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with AI during projects that have a lot of small moving parts but still need my judgment
